aggregation_rule_per_signal: For each observed signal: density_adjusted_mean = mean(obs.lit_score * density_weight[obs.event_id]) across observations. Per brief hard constraint: density_weight applied per-event before mean; do NOT average density_weights first.
n1_disclaimer: VALIDITY NOTICE: These calibration weights are derived from a single native's (n=1) life event corpus. They are provisional, subject to revision as the corpus grows, and must not be interpreted as universal Jyotish signal weights. Per MACRO_PLAN §3.5.A Principle 1 — n=1 validity disclaimer.

summary.h2_finding: Density adjustment (weighted-mean form) shrinks the held_out>training gap by -0.0069 (raw +0.2834 → adjusted +0.2902). Adjustment is informational only — does NOT trigger LL.1 weight revision per shadow-mode discipline.
